task_completion.description: Verify the scenario directory and required files are created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/h) Solent 1924/' exists and contains 'environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini' (e.g., via 'ls' command or file manager).

task_completion.description: Verify the environment configuration is historically accurate
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'environment.ini' showing the date set to June 15, 1924 (e.g., Year=1924, Month=6, Day=15), VisibilityRange set to 4.0, and Weather set to 2.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the ownship configuration is period-appropriate and correctly positioned
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'ownship.ini' showing a period-appropriate vessel model (e.g., steamer, tug, coaster, barge) and a starting position near Latitude 50.77, Longitude -1.29.

task_completion.description: Verify the traffic vessels are period-appropriate and meet the minimum count
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'othership.ini' showing at least 6 different period-appropriate traffic vessels with realistic positions and waypoints. Modern vessels (container ships, VLCCs, LNG tankers, hovercraft, RIBs, fast ferries) must NOT be present.

task_completion.description: Verify the manifest file documents the selected models and reasoning
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of '/home/ga/Documents/1924_manifest.txt' containing a list of the selected vessel model names and text explaining why they are appropriate for the 1924 era.

integrity.description: Verify files were actually saved to the filesystem
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show evidence of files being saved or existing on disk (e.g., 'ls' output, file manager view, or text editor save confirmation), rather than just text typed into a terminal without saving.

integrity.description: Verify the manifest contains original reasoning
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the manifest file should provide actual historical reasoning for the chosen models, rather than just copy-pasting the prompt's instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In 1924, appropriate vessels included coasters, tugs, trawlers, fishing boats, barges, pilot boats, and steamers. Modern vessels like container ships (invented 1956), VLCCs (1966), LNG tankers (1959), hovercraft (1956), RIBs (1964), fast ferries (1990s), and ships with radar must be excluded. The required directory is '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/h) Solent 1924/'.
